name: oled_display_ssd1309
description: OLED SSD1309 display plugin for Volumio – shows playback info, clock, progress, audio format, and volume on a 128x64 I2C OLED
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Drives a 128x64 SSD1309 I2C OLED display showing playback info, clock, progress bar, audio format, volume overlay, and screensaver. Designed for Raspberry Pi with zero MPD interference.
volumio_info.changelog: v1.7.23: Bug fix — 'FLAC PCM' no longer appears momentarily after track changes. The audio-info formatter no longer combines codec name with the 'PCM' placeholder; codec alone is shown during the transient before bitdepth/samplerate are resolved. v1.7.22: Docs only — install instructions clarify the store-vs-source distinction and add build-essential as a one-time prerequisite for source installs.
